docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-12-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-12-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
